label: Music sequence
description: Describes a playlist that loops or plays to completion. A MusicTransitionDef selects which sequence activates; the sequence controls which songs play, in what order, and how transitions between songs are handled.

workerType.label: Worker type
workerType.description: MusicSequenceWorker subclass that drives playback for this sequence. Defaults to MusicSequenceWorker (the base implementation).

song.label: Song
song.description: Single SongDef to play. Use this when the sequence plays exactly one track. Mutually exclusive with songs when using the default worker.

songs.label: Songs
songs.description: List of SongDef items for a random or rotating playlist. Mutually exclusive with song when using the default worker.

nextSequence.label: Next sequence
nextSequence.description: MusicSequenceDef to chain to when this sequence ends naturally. If omitted, playback returns to normal music selection after the sequence finishes.

loop.label: Loop
loop.description: If true, the sequence repeats from the beginning when it finishes instead of ending. Defaults to false.

canBeInterrupted.label: Can be interrupted
canBeInterrupted.description: If false, the sequence plays to completion before a new transition can take over. Defaults to true.

useTransitionForLifetime.label: Use transition for lifetime
useTransitionForLifetime.description: If true, the sequence ends as soon as its originating transition condition stops being met. If false, the sequence plays through regardless. Defaults to true.

transitionOnDanger.label: Transition on danger
transitionOnDanger.description: If true, the sequence ends and a new transition is evaluated when danger begins. Defaults to false.

transitionOnNoDanger.label: Transition on no danger
transitionOnNoDanger.description: If true, the sequence ends and a new transition is evaluated when danger ends. Defaults to false.

endOnNoDanger.label: End on no danger
endOnNoDanger.description: If true, playback stops entirely when danger ends rather than transitioning to another sequence. Defaults to false.

endOnDanger.label: End on danger
endOnDanger.description: If true, playback stops entirely when danger begins rather than transitioning to another sequence. Defaults to false.

loopDelayRange.label: Loop delay range
loopDelayRange.description: Random delay range in seconds between loops when loop is true. Written as min~max. Defaults to 0~0 (no delay).

fadeoutLastSongDuration.label: Fadeout last song duration
fadeoutLastSongDuration.description: Duration in seconds of the crossfade applied to the final song when the sequence ends. Defaults to 10.

fadeInDuration.label: Fade-in duration
fadeInDuration.description: Duration in seconds of the fade-in applied when the sequence starts. Defaults to 0 (no fade-in).

loopFadeout.label: Loop fadeout
loopFadeout.description: If true, the fadeout duration is applied on every loop iteration rather than only the last song. Defaults to false.

overrideFadeout.label: Override fadeout
overrideFadeout.description: Overrides the standard fadeout duration in seconds for this sequence. Absent from XML when not set (nullable float).

overrideVolume.label: Override volume
overrideVolume.description: Overrides the volume multiplier for this sequence. Absent from XML when not set (nullable float).

minTimeToPlay.label: Min time to play
minTimeToPlay.description: Minimum seconds the sequence must play before a transition can interrupt it. Absent from XML when not set (nullable float).

pausedVolumeFactor.label: Paused volume factor
pausedVolumeFactor.description: Volume multiplier applied when the game is paused. Absent from XML when not set (nullable float).

new-song-list-sequence.label: New song list sequence
new-song-list-sequence.description: Looping playlist sequence suitable for ambient or combat music.

new-single-song-sequence.label: New single song sequence
new-single-song-sequence.description: Sequence that plays one track and optionally loops.
